zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hudson於1612年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾格德曼徹斯特時，他的父親John Hudson26歲，母親Alice Cade27歲。他於1639年9月30日與Mary Jackson在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾格德曼徹斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1708年4月22日在英國英格蘭享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hudson于1612年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾格德曼徹斯特时，他的父亲John Hudson26岁，母亲Alice Cade27岁。他于1639年9月30日与Mary Jackson在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾格德曼徹斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1708年4月22日在英国英格兰享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hudson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Hudde (see Hudd ) + -son. This surname is also established in Ireland.

variants.name: Hodsdon
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire and Middlesex): habitational name from Hoddesdon (Hertfordshire), from an Old English personal name Hodd (genitive Hoddes) + dūn ‘hill’. The surname was probably confused with Hudson .

History: The earliest known bearer of this name is Norman de Hoddesdon, recorded in 1165–66. The surname was taken to America by Nicholas Hodsdon c. 1628, from whom probably all current US bearers of the name are descended.

variants.name: Hodson
meanings: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Hod(e), a variant of Ode, + -son. See Ott and Oates .

variants.name: Hudd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hudde (Anglo-Norman French Hud(de)), a pet form of Hue; see Hugh .

variants.name: Hutson
meanings: variant of Hotston, perhaps a habitational name from a lost place in Harting (Sussex), from an Old English personal name Hod (genitive Hoddes) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. It may survive in the name Hudsons Copse in that parish, in which case it could be a source of the surnames Hotson, Hodson, Hudson, and Hutson in Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hudson was born in 1612, in Godmanchester, Huntingdonshire, England, his father, John Hudson, was 26 and his mother, Alice Cade, was 27. He married Mary Jackson on 30 September 1639, in Godmanchester, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 April 1708, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hudson est né en 1612, à Godmanchester, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Hudson, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Cade, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Jackson le 30 septembre 1639, à Godmanchester, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1708, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 96 ans.

Lui sposato Mary Jackson il 30 settembre 1639, nel Godmanchester, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Hudsonが1612年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアゴドマンチェスターで生まれた時，父John Hudsonは26歳，母Alice Cadeは27歳であった。1639年9月30日にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアゴドマンチェスターでMary Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1708年4月22日にイギリスイギリスで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hudson(이)가 1612년 영국 헌틴그도실르 고드먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hudson(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Cade(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1639년 9월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 고드먼체스터에서 Mary Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1708년 4월 22일 영국 잉글랜드에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hudson nasceu em 1612, em Godmanchester, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hudson, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Cade, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Jackson em 30 de setembro de 1639, em Godmanchester, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1708, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hudson родился в 1612 г. в местности годменчестир, хантингдоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hudson было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Cade, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Jackson 30 сентября 1639 г. в местности годменчестир, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 апреля 1708 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 96 лет.
